calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Dec-26-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Harold Hughes for Randall Greenblat.

The Court noted that the request for a reserve has been withdrawn and questions what the expenses/taxes will be and how they will be paid. Mr. Hughes stated that there may be very minimal expenses, that his Client and the Brother (Wayne) worked very closely, and that his Client will cover them and is confident that his Brother will reimburse him. The Court granted the First and Final Report on Waiver of Account, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
